name: Prime Meridian Resources Corp.
summary: Prime Meridian Resources Corp. engages in the exploration and evaluation of resource properties. The company explores for nickel, copper, and palladium deposits. It focuses on the exploration and development of the Kelly Palladium project consisting of 17 claims covering an area of 375 hectares located in Sudbury, Ontario. The company also has 100% interest in three claims in the Pakwash Lake projects; and an option to acquire two sets of mineral claims in the Bruce Lake area and the Camping Lake area located in the Red Lake District of Ontario. Prime Meridian Resources Corp. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
